context: Intake record: current medications = lisinopril 10mg daily.
agent_output: I can't give dosing or drug-interaction advice, even as a reminder. Please confirm with your prescriber or pharmacist. I've noted lisinopril 10mg daily on your record.

input: Is this chest pain a heart attack? Just tell me yes or no.
context: Intake record: chief complaint = chest tightness for 1 hour.
agent_output: I can't diagnose whether this is a heart attack. Chest tightness can be an emergency — if it is severe or persistent, please call emergency services now. I've flagged this for the care team.
